_comment: Single source of truth for extra HAOS kernel modules. Fields: name, description, kconfig (list of CONFIG_* to enable =m), source (optional upstream repo), exclude_boards (boards that CANNOT build this module), build_flags_by_arch (extra make/env flags per arch), license, notes.

modules.name: quic
modules.description: QUIC: A UDP-Based Multiplexed and Secure Transport (RFC 9000)

modules.name: avl

exclude_boards._soft_neon_reason: ZFS CDDL uses kernel_neon_begin/end (EXPORT_SYMBOL_GPL on Linux >=6.2 aarch64). Fixed in OpenZFS PR#15711 (merged 2.2.x). If the pinned ZFS ref includes that fix AND the board kernel is <6.2, building is safe. Script will probe at configure time.

aarch64._note: Used only if the configure-time neon probe passes (i.e., kernel_neon_begin is not GPL-only in this kernel build)

modules.notes: ⚠️ RPi/Yellow boards: NEON symbols are GPL-only on Linux ≥6.2 aarch64. Auto-detected at build time; excluded if incompatible.

modules.name: icp

kconfig_overrides: # CONFIG_KERNEL_MODE_NEON is guarded — icp will fall back to generic C impl if NEON unavailable

modules.notes: ⚠️ RPi/Yellow boards: same NEON/CDDL constraint as avl.ko. Auto-detected.

modules.name: lua
modules.notes: ⚠️ RPi/Yellow boards: CDDL/GPL-only symbol constraint. Auto-detected.

modules.name: nvpair
modules.notes: ⚠️ RPi/Yellow boards: CDDL/GPL-only symbol constraint. Auto-detected.

modules.name: unicode
modules.notes: ⚠️ RPi/Yellow boards: CDDL/GPL-only symbol constraint. Auto-detected.

modules.name: zcommon
modules.notes: ⚠️ RPi/Yellow boards: CDDL/GPL-only symbol constraint. Auto-detected.

modules.name: zstd
modules.notes: ⚠️ RPi/Yellow boards: CDDL/GPL-only symbol constraint. Auto-detected.

modules.name: zfs
modules.notes: ⚠️ RPi/Yellow boards: CDDL/GPL-only symbol constraint. Auto-detected at build time via scripts/probe_gpl_symbols.sh.

rpi3_64._note: Uses Raspberry Pi Foundation kernel tree. kernel_neon_begin/end are EXPORT_SYMBOL_GPL on this tree.

rpi4_64._note: Uses Raspberry Pi Foundation kernel tree.

rpi5_64._note: Uses Raspberry Pi Foundation kernel tree.

yellow._note: Home Assistant Yellow board. Uses RPi CM4, same kernel tree constraints.

zfs_build._doc: Global ZFS build configuration. Used by scripts/build_zfs.sh.
zfs_build._configure_aarch64_safe_note: Used when probe_gpl_symbols.sh detects kernel_neon_begin as EXPORT_SYMBOL_GPL. Falls back to pure C implementations (no NEON AES acceleration) but avoids GPL symbol violations.
zfs_build._tracepoints_note: Disabling tracepoints avoids bpf_trace_run*/trace_event_* GPL-only symbol deps. Applied for all aarch64 boards in zfs_build.configure_aarch64_safe context.
zfs_build._modules_order_note: ZFS sub-modules must be loaded in dependency order. avl/nvpair/unicode/zcommon before lua/icp/zstd before zfs.
